title: Light Roasted Norwegian Cashew Nut Stir-fry
description: A floral and velvety light dish featuring roasted cashew nuts in a halal-friendly stir-fry that highlights the unique flavor of this nut.
instructions: Shell and rinse the cashew nuts. Toss them in a bowl with 1 tablespoon of sesame oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the coated cashews evenly on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast for about 20 minutes or until they are golden brown and crispy.
Meanwhile, in a small mixing bowl, combine soy sauce, ginger paste, green onions, and remaining 1 tablespoon of sesame oil. Mix well to make a dressing.
In a wok or large skillet, heat the remaining tablespoon of sesame oil over medium-high heat. Add minced garlic and stir for about 30 seconds until fragrant but not browned.
Add roasted cashews, green onions, and ginger paste mixture to the wok. Stir well until all ingredients are evenly coated with the dressing.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the liquid has mostly evaporated and you have a velvety consistency.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
